title: Inseco secrets manifest
description: Declares which Infisical vault folders to pull into a gitignored .env.secrets file next to this manifest.

paths.description: Infisical folder paths (without leading slash), e.g. clerk, vendor/app

profiles.description: Named path sets; profile paths replace default paths when --profile is set

skipWhenEnv.description: Skip Infisical in CI when all listed env vars are already set

stubInCi.description: When true, write a stub .env.secrets in CI without calling Infisical

output.description: Output filename only (no path separators), relative to this manifest directory

aliases.description: Copy a pulled secret to extra env var name(s) a build/runtime expects (e.g. CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY -> VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY).

optionalKeys.description: Keys allowed to be absent in this environment; export-gha logs a notice instead of failing

environments.description: Per-environment policy keyed by Infisical env slug (development, preview, production)
